description: Style NoteStylish and sweet without looking overtly grown-up, this pair is perfect for the teen who likes to stay abreast of the latest fashion trends. This pair is just right for the latest season's style with pastel shades dominating the ensemble!Product DetailsPink sandal with leather straps across midfoot and a buckled ankle strap the heel counter with a buckle closurePadded footbed with perforationsTextured outsole with a stacked heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
